articles.title: The families going hungry because of Trump’s food stamp cuts - NBC News
articles.description: Under President Donald Trump’s “big, beautiful bill,” food stamp applicants are fighting to prove eligibility. A crisis in Arizona offers a warning for America.
articles.content: The Arizona Department of Economic Security, which administers federally funded SNAP benefits, acknowledged the drop in people receiving food stamps, including some who should be getting them. The st… [+2298 chars]

articles.title: Young Americans’ job market optimism falls as older adults stay upbeat, new Gallup poll finds - AP News
articles.description: A new poll finds that younger Americans are more pessimistic than older ones about the state of the job market. This is a sudden reversal from just three years ago, when older Americans were more pessimistic. In the United States until 2023 and in many countr…

articles.author: Associated Press
articles.title: Abe Foxman, advocate for American Jews as longtime head of Anti-Defamation League, dies at 86 - CNN
articles.description: Abraham H. Foxman, who was a forceful advocate for American Jews as national director of the Anti-Defamation League for nearly three decades, has died, the ADL said Sunday. He was 86.
